description: Catalog of Common Paper standard legal agreement templates curated for the Prelegal project. All documents are located in the templates/ directory.

templates.name: Mutual NDA - Standard Terms
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA) standard terms, used to protect confidential information exchanged between two parties.

templates.name: Mutual NDA - Cover Page
templates.description: Cover page for the Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, where the parties fill in the deal-specific terms that incorporate the standard terms by reference.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) governing the provision and use of a cloud/SaaS product.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for collaborating with an early customer to develop and refine a product.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement (SLA) defining uptime commitments, support, and remedies for a service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) covering the delivery of professional or consulting services.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) addressing the processing of personal data and related privacy obligations.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement governing the licensing of software to a customer.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for establishing a business partnership between parties.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for running a time-limited product pilot or proof of concept with a customer.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA-covered handling of protected health information.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum covering terms specific to the provision and use of AI products and services.
